schema.description: Options for playing a VRMA animation

transitionSecs.description: Transition duration in seconds for smooth animation blending

repeat.description: Repeat configuration for VRMA animation playback

count.description: Number of times to repeat (only used when type is "count")

repeat.title: VrmaRepeat

waitForCompletion.description: If true, the API will wait until the animation finishes before responding

schema.title: VrmaPlayRequest
